title: Light revenue recovery hero atmosphere
prompt: Create a 16:9 light-premium enterprise hero atmosphere for Transworld Systems Inc. brand work. Abstract revenue recovery operating layer, mostly white and cool blue-white surfaces with subtle TSI dark blue #001E41 structure lines and TSI bright blue #4396F6 signal paths. Refined soft depth, translucent panels, precise Poppins-like label zones but no readable text. Leave clean logo-safe space in the upper left. Elegant, modern, sophisticated, subtle, executive, not a dark command center. No logos, no watermarks, no fake data, no client/account/patient/borrower information, no people, no generic SaaS blobs.
notes: Light-mode default atmosphere with logo-safe area; official logo should be placed afterward.
package_asset_policy: full-resolution PNG omitted from compact package; use bundled WebP preview for visual reference and regenerate from prompt metadata for production use.
